description: Education empowers individuals and shapes societies. It builds knowledge, critical thinking, and values. A well-educated population contributes to economic growth and social harmony. Access to quality education should be a fundamental right for everyone.
eligibilityCriteria: Second Year, First Year, Third Year

description: Technology has transformed modern life. From smartphones to artificial intelligence, it enhances communication, productivity, and convenience. However, overdependence may reduce human interaction. A balanced approach ensures technology serves humanity positively.

Good health is essential for a happy life. Regular exercise, a balanced diet, and proper sleep improve physical and mental well-being. Preventive care and healthy habits reduce the risk of diseases and enhance quality of life.
eligibilityCriteria: First Year, Second Year, Third Year
